title: Cellular Automata Studio
description: Explore 6 rule sets — Life, HighLife, Day&Night, Seeds, Brian's Brain, Custom — with age-glow rendering and presets.
concept: A full-featured cellular automata laboratory. Choose from 6 rule sets, draw patterns with variable brushes, drop famous presets (Glider, Gosper Gun, Pulsar, LWSS), tune simulation speed, and switch between 5 color themes. Cells glow brightest when newly born and fade with age — creating beautiful luminous trails. Save up to 8 named states to localStorage and export any frame as PNG.
features: 6 rule sets: Conway's Life, HighLife, Day & Night, Seeds, Brian's Brain, Custom B/S editor
Draw / erase / flood-fill tools with adjustable brush size
5 classic preset patterns: Glider, LWSS, R-pentomino, Pulsar, Gosper Glider Gun
Age-based cell glow rendering — 5 color themes
Variable simulation speed 1–60 FPS, adjustable grid size
Save/load up to 8 named snapshots to localStorage
Export any frame as PNG download
Full keyboard shortcuts — Space, S, C, R, T, 1–6

interaction.mouse: Click/drag to draw; right-area sidebar for all controls
interaction.click: Preset chips place famous patterns at center; save/load buttons in sidebar
interaction.touch: Touch-draw on canvas; ⚙ button opens sidebar panel
